name: sistema-vouchers
description: Sistema de Gestion de Vouchers - monorepo (backend + frontend)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm --prefix backend run prisma:generate && npm --prefix backend run prisma:migrate -- --name init && npm --prefix backend run seed
scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm --prefix backend run start:prod
